title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code provides analysis of DeepSeek V4, highlighting its breakthrough in reducing inference costs and compute demands. The video examines V4's significance in the open vs closed AI lab competition and discusses the different incentive structures driving development between nations.
